ogTitle: Marinna vs Marks Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marinna and Marks Point.
heading: Marinna vs Marks Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marinna, New South Wales and Marks Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marinna and Marks Point have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Marinna or Marks Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marinna has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Marks Point scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marinna scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Marks Point scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marinna or Marks Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marinna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
